summary: The South Bay closed out March on a fundraising tear, with nearly $4 billion raised across 19 deals—highlighted by mega-rounds for AI and semiconductors like Nexthop AI's $500M Series B in Santa Clara and Ayar Labs' $500M Series E in San Jose. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable or growing, though a handful of companies are tightening belts. This week brings a panel on voice AI ethics at Santa Clara County Library and a community health forum at San Jose State.
